overall.description: Game engine footage from a first-person perspective showing two curved brutalist residential towers against a clear blue sky. The player camera slowly pans horizontally across the concrete facade, revealing the architectural details and horizontal balcony lines while standing in an urban plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza at base of curved brutalist residential towers

matching curved concrete tower with identical horizontal architectural lines and facade pattern
low concrete barrier wall in immediate foreground on the right side of the frame

segments.scene_description: The camera stands at ground level in an empty urban plaza, slowly panning left across two massive curved brutalist residential towers. The concrete structures feature distinctive horizontal lines and blue glass balcony railings against a clear midday sky, with a low concrete wall visible in the right foreground throughout the smooth camera movement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous horizontal pan across a pair of massive brutalist residential towers from a ground-level perspective in an empty urban plaza. It begins by focusing on the stark concrete facade of the first structure, where the camera glides steadily to the left. As the movement progresses, the view reveals the rhythmic repetition of horizontal lines and blue glass balcony railings set against a clear midday sky. The scene maintains a consistent sense of scale, with a low concrete wall remaining visible in the right foreground as the camera finally completes its sweep across the curved architectural forms.
